arts.ttl: Preview: Egypt vs. Sierra Leone - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Tuesday's World Cup Qualifying - Africa clash between Egypt and Sierra Leone, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Mo Salah gets one over on Man Utd as Liverpool star reaches stunning milestone
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah has a stunning scoring record against Manchester United fierce rivals Liverpool and the Egyptian frontman has rubbed salt into the wounds after potentially his final appearance

arts.ttl: Liverpool legend fires warning over Mohamed Salah & Virgil van Dijk contracts
arts.sum: Dirk Kuyt urges Liverpool to hand new contracts to Mohamed Salah & Virgil van Dijk soon.
